reviews.comment:
En camino de viaje.  Teníamos que cargar combustible a eso de la madrugada tipo 3 hs. Cargamos combustible y queríamos tomar un café, pero nos dijeron que estaban limpiando la máquina. Dijimos bueno pero esperamos no hay apuro, para no dormirse en el camino !! . Ok respondieron quienes estaban trabajando calculen que a las 6 o 7 de la mañana arrancamos !! . En fin tal vez no había ganas de trabajar solo eso nos paso en esa ACA villa Mercedes. En las demás YPF no nos paso . Ni a la vuelta . En todos lados tomábamos Café

(Translated by Google)
On the way. We had to refuel around 3 a.m. We refueled and wanted to get some coffee, but they told us they were cleaning the machine. We said, "Okay, but wait, there's no rush, so we don't fall asleep on the way!" "Okay," those who were working responded, "I reckon we'll start at 6 or 7 a.m.!" Anyway, maybe we just didn't feel like working, that's the only thing that happened to us at that ACA Villa Mercedes. It didn't happen at the other YPF stations. Not even on the way back. We drank coffee everywhere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bjV2TjNBRRAB
